title: Visual Infested Stones
description: Easily distinguish infested blocks from regular ones!
body:
**Introduction**\
Do you hate accidentally mixing up stone blocks with their infested variants? Or do you hate accidentally breaking infested stone bricks in Strongholds? Then this pack introduces a Vanilla-friendly way of telling them apart.

**Modified features**\
All Infested Blocks now have unique textures with little silverfish faces to distinguish them from their regular counterparts

**Notes**\
Hypothetically, the pack should be compatible with versions older than 1.21.4 and the newly introduced item model format. However, I haven't got to testing them yet.

**Issues and feedback**\
If you encounter any problems with the pack or would like to leave any other feedback, feel free to contact me on Discord: @miau_the_cat
